title: serapias lingua subsp. oxyglottis
intro: Serapias lingua subsp. oxyglottis, also known as the Tongue-orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Serapias lingua subsp. oxyglottis include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the roots or leaves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
